name: Tellingly
subtitle: How rare are you?
promotionalText: One sharp question a day. Answer once, see how rare you are, and compare the tiny places you and a friend secretly diverge.
description:
Tellingly gives you one sharp, playful question a day: a moral dilemma, a secret habit, a hypothetical, or a preference you can answer in one tap.

The second you answer, you see the live distribution of how everyone else answered, how rare your choice was, and a short read on what that answer suggests about how you operate.

Your answers compound into a private pattern map. Each week, Tellingly turns that pattern into a shareable card: a rarity score and one specific verdict line that feels screenshot-worthy because it says the quiet part clearly.

Send a compatibility link to a friend and they answer the same set. You both see where your instincts line up and where they split, without building a feed, following anyone, or performing for a social graph.

No account required. No public profile. Just one sentence a day that tells you something true.
whatsNew: Tellingly is launching with daily questions, live rarity distributions, private pattern maps, shareable cards, and friend compatibility links.
reviewNotes: Tellingly does not require login. The app asks one daily question, posts anonymous hashed answer events to Cloudflare D1 for aggregate distribution counts, and stores the user's pattern locally. Use the app normally by tapping any answer. Comparison links are created from the final screen and expire after 30 days. Tellingly Plus unlocks the full answer archive, trait trends, unlimited compatibility links, comparison history, and extra question packs. To trigger the paywall in this build, answer today's question, finish the round, create one free compatibility link, then tap Compare again. The paywall includes monthly and annual plans plus a visible Restore Purchases control. No third-party ads, camera, contacts, microphone, location, or social login are used in this build.

iapRecommendation.freeTier: Daily question, live distribution, immediate rarity, weekly share card, one active comparison link.
iapRecommendation.availability: Both subscriptions have subscriptionAvailability availableInNewTerritories=true and one upfront plan availability record.
iapRecommendation.reviewNoteStatus: Product-level subscription review notes added in App Store Connect on June 24, 2026.
paidUnlocks: All six trait axes with trend lines
Group filters once the population is large enough
